docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PAULINE MADRID IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERNESTO GALDAMEZ IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MADRID, PAULINE AS TO DEFENDANT GALDAMEZ, ERNESTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
